title: Figure 4 in Morphology, complete mitochondrial genome, and molecular phylogeny of Rhabdias macrocephalum n. sp. (Nematoda: Rhabdiasidae) from Diploderma splendidum (Reptilia: Agamidae)

description: Figure 4. Gene maps of the mitochondrial genomes of Rhabdias macrocephalum n. sp. Abbreviations: NCR, non-coding region; PCG, protein coding gene; rRNA, ribosomal RNA; tRNA, transfer RNA.
